    <item>
        <guid>nba527612</guid>
        <title>Nikola Jokic: Pours in 40 against Wemby</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/nikola-jokic-3612</link>
        <description>Jokic notched 40 points (13-25 FG, 1-5 3Pt, 13-15 FT), eight rebounds, 13 assists and three blocks in 44 minutes during Saturday's 136-134 overtime win over San Antonio.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 04 Apr 2026 4:54:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba527610</guid>
        <title>Victor Wembanyama: Loses OT duel with Joker</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/victor-wembanyama-5809</link>
        <description>Wembanyama posted 34 points (8-17 FG, 2-6 3Pt, 16-17 FT), 18 rebounds, seven assists, five blocks and one steal over 40 minutes during Saturday's 136-134 overtime loss to the Nuggets.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 04 Apr 2026 4:46:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba527606</guid>
        <title>Kel'el Ware: Huge performance off bench Saturday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/kelel-ware-6275</link>
        <description>Ware supplied 24 points (10-15 FG, 3-6 3Pt, 1-2 FT), 19 rebounds, two assists and seven blocks in 36 minutes off the bench during Saturday's 152-136 win over the Wizards.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 04 Apr 2026 4:33:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba527605</guid>
        <title>Jaime Jaquez: Erupts for game-high 32 in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jaime-jaquez-5960</link>
        <description>Jaquez totaled 32 points (12-18 FG, 1-2 3Pt, 7-7 FT), three rebounds, four assists and one steal in 32 minutes off the bench during Saturday's 152-136 victory over the Wizards.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sat, 04 Apr 2026 4:25:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba527601</guid>
        <title>GG Jackson: Doubtful for Sunday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/gg-jackson-5946</link>
        <description>Jackson is doubtful to play Sunday in Milwaukee due to left knee soreness.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
